a.title: Capability
reinforce: Core finance skills - identify what we keep vs. what collapses
Agent maturity: how to develop, recruit, certify, and manage agents
Hybrid finance model - define the agent-to-human ratio
refine: Training models for both talent and agents - test environments needed
Oversight and accountability - how to certify agents, ensure judgment
Future deliverables - where do we get expertise when routine work shifts to AI
a.action: Map our biggest pain points and opportunities. Answer: what are costs of inaction vs. costs of investment - for both agent development and talent development?

b.title: Operating Model
reinforce: Deliver on the digital roadmap - understand interdependencies
Business acumen - the thing AI cannot replace
refine: GRaPE development and utilization - split Dia/Pharma, integrated DIS
Tool utilization over time as new technologies arrive
Judgment and execution cycle: based on info I have, what do I decide - then execute
b.action: If AI takes over most tasks, would the organization be just smaller - or structured differently? Get more operational across ALL initiatives.

c.title: Leadership
reinforce: Tech, Data & AI curiosity and literacy; Management trust and outcomes
refine: Level of trust in AI - trained by specialized trainers
Family of specialized capability; individualization of outcomes to Roche
Judgment + decision making + focus leading to execution
c.action: Build a Credibility/Impact heatmap - 'future ready vs. disrupted' - scored across Data, Process, Speed, Compliance scenarios, and Business Impact.
